# GEOCITATION

GEOCITATION is an evidence-backed website audit for public AI discoverability and citation readiness.

## Canonical pages

- [Home and live audit](https://geocitation.org/)
- [Methodology](https://geocitation.org/methodology)
- [Frequently asked questions](https://geocitation.org/faq)
- [About GEOCITATION](https://geocitation.org/about)
- [Privacy policy](https://geocitation.org/privacy)
- [Terms of service](https://geocitation.org/terms)

## Product boundaries

The live audit evaluates source HTML and public technical resources such as robots.txt, sitemap.xml, JSON-LD and llms.txt. It reports citation-readiness signals and does not claim that an AI platform currently cites a submitted website.
